title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXXVI. Natural History.
content:
Pussy cat Mole,
            Jump'd over a coal,
            And in her best petticoat burnt a great hole.
        Poor pussy's weeping, she'll have no more milk,
        Until her best petticoat's mended with silk.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXXXVI. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
